deck: When the CDC called at 1am in March 2020, Dimagi went from no solution to a fully deployed, at-scale COVID-19 case investigation and contact tracing system in under six weeks, entering the US market for the first time after two decades in global health.
seo_description: How Dimagi entered the US market for COVID-19, deploying CommCare for case investigation and contact tracing and carrying seven lessons from 20 years of global health.
og_description: Dimagi's entry to the US market for COVID-19: contact tracing at scale and seven lessons from 20 years of global health.

pull_quote.text: We went from no solution to a fully deployed at scale solution in less than six weeks. And all of that is really a testament to the power of a technology platform.
pull_quote.cite: Sarah Sagan, Senior Director of Delivery

bullets: The 1am CDC email that pulled Dimagi into US public health, with a team on the ground in Santa Clara by Monday morning
From Santa Clara to San Francisco: why real-time lab data feeds made or broke contact tracing at scale
Scaling overnight across New York, New Jersey, Philadelphia, the Navajo Nation, Alaska, and Colorado
The human cost of wartime: Sarah and Lily on exhaustion, leadership, and pulling the team back to a sustainable pace
Seven lessons from global health, from "paper is inescapable" to "open source rules," applied to US public health
Building a division that grew from 10 people to more than 50, and where it heads next with behavioral health and Monkeypox
Partner, not vendor: what makes Dimagi different in a crowded US health technology market

stats.label: of US COVID cases tracked nationally on CommCare at the height of the pandemic
contact tracers using CommCare to contain the spread of COVID-19
from no solution to a fully deployed, at-scale system in New York State

guests.name: Carter Powers
guests.role: Managing Director of Dimagi's US Health division, formerly COO, leading the team's growth from a wartime sprint to a steady-state division.

guests.name: Sarah Sagan
guests.role: Senior Director of Delivery, who led the New York State deployment and the effort to bring the team back to a sustainable pace.

guests.name: Lily Olson
guests.role: Senior Director of Partnerships, who led early partnerships including San Francisco and helped open new state and local government engagements.
